allow: PowerShell($files = @\('app/widget/page.tsx','app/api/widget/vote/route.ts','app/api/dashboard/analytics/route.ts','prisma/schema.prisma','scripts/seed-feedback-support.ts'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $c = Get-Content -Raw $f; $new = $c -creplace "'MONKFEED'", "'UPVOTE'" -creplace '"MONKFEED"', '"UPVOTE"' -creplace 'voteType \\\(MONKFEED\\\)', 'voteType \(UPVOTE\)' -creplace '// MONKFEED or DOWNVOTE', '// UPVOTE or DOWNVOTE'; if \($new -ne $c\) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Resolve-Path $f\), $new\); Write-Output "fixed $f" } })
